name: T
notes: body temperature; composite simulations assume 37C unless Q10-scaled

name: C_m
notes: mitochondrial membrane capacitance per unit volume

name: V_m
notes: mitochondrial volume fraction typical of isolated-mito assay

name: NAD_tot
notes: total NAD+ + NADH pool in matrix

name: PO2
notes: oxygen partial pressure in standard respirometry

name: X_C1
notes: Complex I activity (fitted — LOAD-BEARING; deep-dive N=3)

name: X_F
notes: F1F0 ATP synthase activity (fitted — LOAD-BEARING; deep-dive N=3)

name: E_ANT
notes: ANT expression level (fitted — LOAD-BEARING; deep-dive N=3)

name: E_PiC
notes: phosphate carrier activity (fitted; scales PIt2mB_mitoMap coupling)

name: X_AtC
notes: cytosolic ATP hydrolysis rate — QAMAS sweeps this for PO-curve

name: DrGo_F
notes: standard free energy F1F0 (ATP hydrolysis Gibbs)

name: del_D
notes: ANT charge translocation parameter for ADP

name: del_T
notes: ANT charge translocation parameter for ATP

name: k2o_ANT
notes: ANT k2 base rate (9.54/60 — LOAD-BEARING; deep-dive N=3)

name: k3o_ANT
notes: ANT k3 base rate (30.05/60 — LOAD-BEARING; deep-dive N=3)

name: K0o_D
notes: ANT ADP dissociation constant at 0 mV

name: K0o_T
notes: ANT ATP dissociation constant at 0 mV
